Cards

Card de diferenciadores de valor (ícono + título + descripción). Fondo blanco en reposo; al hover invierte a la superficie cobalt (--color-bg-surface, uso puntual).

Default

Expert knowledge

Expert financial planning and strategic insights to drive sustainable growth.

Hover

Expert knowledge

Expert financial planning and strategic insights to drive sustainable growth.

<div class="card-feature">
  <span class="card-feature__icon"><i data-lucide="chart-column"></i></span>
  <h4 class="card-feature__title">Expert knowledge</h4>
  <p class="card-feature__desc">Expert financial planning and strategic insights to drive sustainable growth.</p>
</div>

<!-- El estado hover es automático (:hover / :focus-within).
     .is-hover solo existe para documentarlo aquí de forma estática. -->

FAQ

Acordeón de preguntas frecuentes. Un solo item abierto a la vez; el ícono + rota e invierte a − y se revela la respuesta con una división superior.

We provide a range of financial and consulting services including business strategy, financial planning, investment advisory, risk management, and operational consulting to help businesses grow and succeed.

Our services are built for startups, small businesses, and established companies looking to strengthen their financial strategy, streamline operations, and plan for sustainable growth.

We start with a full review of your current financial position, then build a tailored strategy around your goals, industry, and risk tolerance, revisiting it regularly as your business evolves.

Yes. Every engagement starts with a one-on-one consultation so our recommendations reflect your specific numbers, goals, and constraints, not a generic template.

All client data is handled under strict confidentiality agreements and stored on secure, access-controlled systems, reviewed regularly to meet industry compliance standards.

<div class="faq-item">
  <button class="faq-item__question" type="button" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="faq-answer-1">
    <span>What services do you offer?</span>
    <span class="faq-item__icon">
      <i data-lucide="plus" class="faq-item__icon-plus"></i>
      <i data-lucide="minus" class="faq-item__icon-minus"></i>
    </span>
  </button>
  <div class="faq-item__answer" id="faq-answer-1">
    <div class="faq-item__answer-inner">
      <p>Respuesta…</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- .is-active en .faq-item = estado abierto. El toggle vive en main.js
     (initFaqAccordion), un solo item abierto a la vez. -->

Button Elite

CTA píldora con badge circular. Fondo --color-bg-surface en reposo; al hover una cortina horizontal (izquierda → derecha) cubre el botón con --color-secondary.

Default Learn More About
Hover Learn More About 
<a href="#" class="button-elite">
  <span class="button-elite__label">Learn More About</span>
  <span class="button-elite__icon"><i data-lucide="arrow-right"></i></span>
</a>

<!-- El estado hover es automático (:hover / :focus-visible).
     .is-hover solo existe para documentarlo aquí de forma estática. -->

Badges

Etiqueta/eyebrow con ícono, para usar sobre un section-header. Variante --light sobre fondo claro, --transparent sobre fondo oscuro.

Light Our Projects
Transparent (sobre fondo oscuro)
Industries We Serve 
<!-- Variante light — sobre fondo claro -->
<span class="badge badge--light">
  <i data-lucide="asterisk" class="badge__icon"></i>
  <span class="badge__label">Our Projects</span>
</span>

<!-- Variante transparent — sobre fondo oscuro -->
<span class="badge badge--transparent">
  <i data-lucide="asterisk" class="badge__icon"></i>
  <span class="badge__label">Industries We Serve</span>
</span>

Card Project Item

Tarjeta de proyecto/portfolio con imagen. Al hover, la imagen escala levemente y aparece el ícono de flecha sobre un círculo azul en la esquina superior derecha.

Default
Financial Planning

Startup financial strategy development
Hover
Risk Management

Financial Risk Analysis and Protection

 
<a href="#" class="card-project-item">
  <img class="card-project-item__img" src="assets/img/portfolio/proyecto-1.jpg"
       alt="…" loading="lazy">
  <span class="card-project-item__arrow"><i data-lucide="arrow-up-right"></i></span>
  <div class="card-project-item__panel">
    <span class="card-project-item__tag">
      <span class="card-project-item__dot"></span>
      Financial Planning
    </span>
    <h3 class="card-project-item__title">Startup financial strategy development</h3>
  </div>
</a>

<!-- El estado hover es automático (:hover / :focus-visible).
     .is-hover solo existe para documentarlo aquí de forma estática. -->

Pricing Tab Item

Card de plan de servicio, agrupada en un .pricing-toggle-group junto al switch Monthly / Yearly. El switch alterna la vista de precio de todas las cards del grupo a la vez (ver initPricingToggle en main.js). Variante --active (plan destacado, card central): fondo oscuro que sobresale de la fila + badge "Most Popular" a caballo del borde superior.

Monthly Yearly

Basic Plan

Ideal for small business & individuals

$49.00 /Monthly $490.00 /Yearly

What's Included:

  • Multi Expert Consulting Team
  • 24/7 Priority Support and Services
  • Corporate Strategy, Transformation
  • Email Support & Guidance
Get Started With Plan
Most Popular

Standard Plan

Ideal for small business & individuals

$149.00 /Monthly $1,490.00 /Yearly

What's Included:

  • Multi Expert Consulting Team
  • 24/7 Priority Support and Services
  • Corporate Strategy, Transformation
  • Email Support & Guidance
Get Started With Plan

Premium Plan

Ideal for small business & individuals

$449.00 /Monthly $4,490.00 /Yearly

What's Included:

  • Multi Expert Consulting Team
  • 24/7 Priority Support and Services
  • Corporate Strategy, Transformation
  • Email Support & Guidance
Get Started With Plan 
<div class="pricing-toggle-group">
  <div class="pricing-toggle">
    <span class="pricing-toggle__label is-active" data-period="monthly">Monthly</span>
    <button class="pricing-toggle__switch" type="button" role="switch"
            aria-checked="false" aria-label="Cambiar a facturación anual">
      <span class="pricing-toggle__switch-thumb"></span>
    </button>
    <span class="pricing-toggle__label" data-period="yearly">Yearly</span>
  </div>

  <div class="pricing-tab-item">
    <span class="pricing-tab-item__icon"><i data-lucide="database"></i></span>
    <h4 class="pricing-tab-item__title">Basic Plan</h4>
    <p class="pricing-tab-item__desc">Ideal for small business &amp; individuals</p>

    <div class="pricing-tab-item__panel">
      <div class="pricing-tab-item__price">
        <span class="pricing-tab-item__price-view is-active" data-period="monthly">
          <span class="pricing-tab-item__price-amount">$49.00</span>
          <span class="pricing-tab-item__price-period">/Monthly</span>
        </span>
        <span class="pricing-tab-item__price-view" data-period="yearly">
          <span class="pricing-tab-item__price-amount">$490.00</span>
          <span class="pricing-tab-item__price-period">/Yearly</span>
        </span>
      </div>
      <hr class="pricing-tab-item__divider">
      <p class="pricing-tab-item__included">What's Included:</p>
      <ul class="pricing-tab-item__features">
        <li class="pricing-tab-item__feature">
          <span class="pricing-tab-item__feature-icon"><i data-lucide="check"></i></span>
          <span class="pricing-tab-item__feature-label">Multi Expert Consulting Team</span>
        </li>
        <!-- … resto de features -->
      </ul>
    </div>

    <a href="#" class="button-elite button-elite--block pricing-tab-item__cta">
      <span class="button-elite__label">Get Started With Plan</span>
      <span class="button-elite__icon"><i data-lucide="arrow-right"></i></span>
    </a>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- El switch alterna .is-active entre los dos .pricing-tab-item__price-view
     de cada card del mismo .pricing-toggle-group (ver initPricingToggle en main.js). -->

Card Service Elite

Card de servicio con imagen, superficie --color-surface-glass (fondo oscuro semitransparente, para ir sobre secciones oscuras). Al hover, la imagen escala levemente y una cortina azul translúcida sube desde abajo sobre la foto.

Default

Financial strategy & advisory

Expert financial planning and insights drive long-term growth stability.

Read More
Hover

Financial strategy & advisory

Expert financial planning and insights drive long-term growth stability.

Read More 
<a href="#" class="card-service-elite">
  <div class="card-service-elite__media">
    <img class="card-service-elite__img" src="assets/img/portfolio/servicio-1.jpg"
         alt="…" loading="lazy">
    <span class="card-service-elite__curtain"></span>
    <span class="card-service-elite__icon"><i data-lucide="chart-column"></i></span>
  </div>
  <div class="card-service-elite__body">
    <h3 class="card-service-elite__title">Financial strategy &amp; advisory</h3>
    <p class="card-service-elite__desc">Expert financial planning and insights drive long-term growth stability.</p>
    <hr class="card-service-elite__divider">
    <span class="card-service-elite__link">Read More <i data-lucide="arrow-right"></i></span>
  </div>
</a>

<!-- El estado hover es automático (:hover / :focus-visible).
     .is-hover solo existe para documentarlo aquí de forma estática.
     El fondo oscuro del demo es solo del UI Kit: el card en sí ya trae
     su propia superficie translúcida (--color-surface-glass). -->

Card Service Item

Card de servicio (ícono + título + texto + imagen), superficie --color-surface-glass. Al hover: el ícono invierte de color, la imagen escala levemente y aparece el ícono de flecha sobre una cortina azul translúcida que sube desde abajo de la foto.

Default

Wealth Management

We provide expert investment advice and portfolio management solutions designed to maximize returns and minimize risks.

Hover

Wealth Management

We provide expert investment advice and portfolio management solutions designed to maximize returns and minimize risks.

<div class="card-service-item">
  <div class="card-service-item__header">
    <span class="card-service-item__icon"><i data-lucide="monitor"></i></span>
    <h3 class="card-service-item__title">Wealth Management</h3>
  </div>
  <hr class="card-service-item__divider">
  <p class="card-service-item__desc">We provide expert investment advice and portfolio management solutions designed to maximize returns and minimize risks.</p>
  <div class="card-service-item__media">
    <img class="card-service-item__img" src="assets/img/portfolio/servicio-1.jpg" alt="…" loading="lazy">
    <span class="card-service-item__curtain"></span>
    <span class="card-service-item__arrow"><i data-lucide="arrow-up-right"></i></span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- El estado hover es automático (:hover / :focus-within).
     .is-hover solo existe para documentarlo aquí de forma estática. -->

Card Ghost Item

Ícono + título + descripción, sin superficie propia de card (se apoya directo en el fondo de la sección). Al hover, el fondo del ícono invierte de azul a oscuro. Variante --row: ícono a la izquierda, título y descripción a la derecha.

Default

Data Driven Strategies

We use market insight & analytics to create smart strategy.

Hover

Data Driven Strategies

We use market insight & analytics to create smart strategy.

Variante --row

Expert Financial Planning

To simplify complex financial decisions and provide reliable guidance.

<div class="card-ghost-item">
  <span class="card-ghost-item__icon"><i data-lucide="binoculars"></i></span>
  <h4 class="card-ghost-item__title">Data Driven Strategies</h4>
  <p class="card-ghost-item__desc">We use market insight &amp; analytics to create smart strategy.</p>
</div>

<!-- Variante --row: ícono a la izquierda, título+descripción a la derecha -->
<div class="card-ghost-item card-ghost-item--row">
  <span class="card-ghost-item__icon"><i data-lucide="lightbulb"></i></span>
  <div class="card-ghost-item__content">
    <h4 class="card-ghost-item__title">Expert Financial Planning</h4>
    <p class="card-ghost-item__desc">To simplify complex financial decisions and provide reliable guidance.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- El estado hover es automático (:hover / :focus-within).
     .is-hover solo existe para documentarlo aquí de forma estática. -->

Card Metric Item

Card de métrica/logro (ícono + título + divisor + cifra + descripción). Al hover, el ícono invierte a oscuro y el card se desplaza levemente hacia arriba con una sombra suave.

Default

Transactions Advised

$1B+

Major financial decisions with strategic insights

Hover

Transactions Advised

$1B+

Major financial decisions with strategic insights

<div class="card-metric-item">
  <span class="card-metric-item__icon"><i data-lucide="handshake"></i></span>
  <h4 class="card-metric-item__title">Transactions Advised</h4>
  <hr class="card-metric-item__divider">
  <div class="card-metric-item__stat">
    <span class="card-metric-item__value">$1B<span class="card-metric-item__value-plus">+</span></span>
    <p class="card-metric-item__desc">Major financial decisions with strategic insights</p>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- El estado hover es automático (:hover / :focus-within).
     .is-hover solo existe para documentarlo aquí de forma estática. -->

Card Context Elite

Card grande de contenido: imagen a sangre a la izquierda + título, descripción y checklist a la derecha. Al hover, la imagen escala y una luz diagonal se expande/dispersa sobre ella.

Default

Financial Solutions for Healthcare and Wellness Excellence

We provide expert financial guidance and tailored consulting solutions for healthcare providers and wellness businesses, helping them optimize operations, manage costs, ensure compliance, and achieve sustainable growth.

  • Ensure adherence to healthcare regulations while minimizing financial risks.
  • Implement long-term financial planning & investment strategies to support.
  • Streamline budgeting, cost control and resource allocation for better efficiency.
Hover

Financial Solutions for Healthcare and Wellness Excellence

We provide expert financial guidance and tailored consulting solutions for healthcare providers and wellness businesses, helping them optimize operations, manage costs, ensure compliance, and achieve sustainable growth.

  • Ensure adherence to healthcare regulations while minimizing financial risks.
  • Implement long-term financial planning & investment strategies to support.
  • Streamline budgeting, cost control and resource allocation for better efficiency. 
<div class="card-context-elite">
  <div class="card-context-elite__media">
    <img class="card-context-elite__img" src="assets/img/portfolio/contexto-1.jpg" alt="…" loading="lazy">
    <span class="card-context-elite__curtain"></span>
  </div>
  <div class="card-context-elite__body">
    <h3 class="card-context-elite__title">Financial Solutions for Healthcare and Wellness Excellence</h3>
    <p class="card-context-elite__desc">We provide expert financial guidance…</p>
    <hr class="card-context-elite__divider">
    <ul class="card-context-elite__list">
      <li class="card-context-elite__item">
        <span class="card-context-elite__item-icon"><i data-lucide="check"></i></span>
        Ensure adherence to healthcare regulations while minimizing financial risks.
      </li>
      <!-- … resto de items -->
    </ul>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- El estado hover es automático (:hover / :focus-within).
     .is-hover solo existe para documentarlo aquí de forma estática. -->

Forms

Input y textarea con dos variantes de color: --light (fondo claro) y --dark (fondo oscuro, fill translúcido). El botón de envío reutiliza button-elite.

Light

Get In Touch

Dark

Get In Touch

<label class="sr-only" for="first-name">Nombre</label>
<input class="form-field form-field--dark" type="text" id="first-name" placeholder="First Name">

<label class="sr-only" for="message">Mensaje</label>
<textarea class="form-field form-field--dark" id="message" placeholder="Write Message..."></textarea>

<!-- Cambiar --dark por --light según el fondo de la sección. -->

Special Quote

Cita destacada con acento vertical (--color-bg-surface) y footer de credibilidad (ícono + caption). Sin estados de interacción.

“ Smart financial decision today create the foundation for sustainable growth. ”

Expert backed information that helps you understand. 
<blockquote class="special-quote">
  <p class="special-quote__text">“ Smart financial decision today create the foundation for sustainable growth. ”</p>
  <hr class="special-quote__divider">
  <div class="special-quote__footer">
    <span class="special-quote__icon"><i data-lucide="check"></i></span>
    <span class="special-quote__caption">Expert backed information that helps you understand.</span>
  </div>
</blockquote>

Testimonial Item

Reseña de cliente: avatar + nombre/rol, estrellas, cita, divisor y una métrica de respaldo (mismo patrón de cifra + caption que card-metric-item). Variantes --light (gris claro) y --dark (fondo oscuro translúcido, --color-surface-glass). Sin estados de interacción. Además, --glass-dark/--glass-light: vidrio esmerilado real (backdrop-filter: blur(30px)) para colocar sobre imágenes o fondos con textura; esta composición no lleva avatar/métrica, usa estrellas + cita + divisor + nombre/rol + marca de cita decorativa.

Light
Michael Brown CFO, Global Ventures

“Their insights into investment strategies helped me grow my assets and plan for long-term financial stability.”

65%

Strategic Partnerships Built to Enhance Growth

Dark
Michael Brown CFO, Global Ventures

“Their insights into investment strategies helped me grow my assets and plan for long-term financial stability.”

65%

Strategic Partnerships Built to Enhance Growth

Glass Dark (backdrop-filter)

Their professionalism and deep financial knowledge are unmatched. We now have a clear investment plan and feel confident about our future.

Courtney Henry CEO, Tech Solutions Ltd.
”
Glass Light (backdrop-filter)

Their professionalism and deep financial knowledge are unmatched. We now have a clear investment plan and feel confident about our future.

Courtney Henry CEO, Tech Solutions Ltd.
” 
<div class="testimonial-item testimonial-item--light">
  <div class="testimonial-item__header">
    <img class="testimonial-item__avatar" src="assets/img/portfolio/avatar-1.jpg" alt="Michael Brown" loading="lazy">
    <div class="testimonial-item__person">
      <span class="testimonial-item__name">Michael Brown</span>
      <span class="testimonial-item__role">CFO, Global Ventures</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="testimonial-item__stars">
    <i data-lucide="star"></i><i data-lucide="star"></i><i data-lucide="star"></i><i data-lucide="star"></i><i data-lucide="star"></i>
  </div>
  <p class="testimonial-item__quote">“Their insights into investment strategies helped me grow my assets and plan for long-term financial stability.”</p>
  <hr class="testimonial-item__divider">
  <div class="testimonial-item__stat">
    <span class="testimonial-item__stat-value">65<span class="testimonial-item__stat-percent">%</span></span>
    <p class="testimonial-item__stat-caption">Strategic Partnerships Built to Enhance Growth</p>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Cambiar --light por --dark según el fondo de la sección. -->
<!-- Variante vidrio esmerilado: sin avatar/métrica -->
<div class="testimonial-item testimonial-item--glass-dark">
  <div class="testimonial-item__stars">
    <i data-lucide="star"></i><i data-lucide="star"></i><i data-lucide="star"></i><i data-lucide="star"></i><i data-lucide="star"></i>
  </div>
  <p class="testimonial-item__quote">Their professionalism and deep financial knowledge are unmatched…</p>
  <hr class="testimonial-item__divider">
  <div class="testimonial-item__footer">
    <div class="testimonial-item__person">
      <span class="testimonial-item__name">Courtney Henry</span>
      <span class="testimonial-item__role">CEO, Tech Solutions Ltd.</span>
    </div>
    <span class="testimonial-item__quote-mark">”</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Cambiar --glass-dark por --glass-light según el fondo. Requiere que el
     elemento tenga algo detrás para que el desenfoque sea visible (una
     imagen, no un color plano). -->

Google Rating Box

Logo de Google + puntaje + estrellas + caption de reseñas. Sin superficie propia, se apoya directo en el fondo de la sección. Sin estados de interacción.

4.9/5.0

Based on 25K+ reviews

<div class="google-rating-box">
  <span class="google-rating-box__logo">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 48 48" aria-hidden="true"><!-- G de Google, 4 colores --></svg>
  </span>
  <div class="google-rating-box__content">
    <div class="google-rating-box__row">
      <span class="google-rating-box__score">4.9/5.0</span>
      <span class="google-rating-box__stars">
        <i data-lucide="star"></i><i data-lucide="star"></i><i data-lucide="star"></i><i data-lucide="star"></i><i data-lucide="star"></i>
      </span>
    </div>
    <p class="google-rating-box__caption">Based on 25K+ reviews</p>
  </div>
</div>

Post Card

Card de artículo/blog (imagen + título + divisor + "Read More"). Efecto creativo: la imagen arranca en blanco y negro y revela color + zoom sutil al hover.

Default

Top Investment Strategies for Long Term Wealth

Read More
Hover

Top Investment Strategies for Long Term Wealth

Read More 
<a href="#" class="post-card">
  <div class="post-card__media">
    <img class="post-card__img" src="assets/img/portfolio/post-1.jpg" alt="…" loading="lazy">
  </div>
  <div class="post-card__body">
    <h3 class="post-card__title">Top Investment Strategies for Long Term Wealth</h3>
    <hr class="post-card__divider">
    <span class="post-card__link">Read More <i data-lucide="arrow-right"></i></span>
  </div>
</a>

<!-- El estado hover es automático (:hover / :focus-visible).
     .is-hover solo existe para documentarlo aquí de forma estática. -->

Service Item Image Metal

Card de servicio a imagen completa, con scrim degradado para legibilidad. Al hover: el ícono invierte de color (azul → blanco) y la imagen escala levemente.

Default

Investment Advisory

We provide expert financial guidance to help you manage investments.

Read More
Hover

Investment Advisory

We provide expert financial guidance to help you manage investments.

Read More 
<a href="#" class="service-item-image-metal">
  <img class="service-item-image-metal__img" src="assets/img/portfolio/servicio-1.jpg" alt="…" loading="lazy">
  <span class="service-item-image-metal__scrim"></span>
  <span class="service-item-image-metal__icon"><i data-lucide="sparkle"></i></span>
  <div class="service-item-image-metal__body">
    <h3 class="service-item-image-metal__title">Investment Advisory</h3>
    <p class="service-item-image-metal__desc">We provide expert financial guidance to help you manage investments.</p>
    <hr class="service-item-image-metal__divider">
    <span class="service-item-image-metal__link">Read More <i data-lucide="arrow-right"></i></span>
  </div>
</a>

<!-- El estado hover es automático (:hover / :focus-visible).
     .is-hover solo existe para documentarlo aquí de forma estática. -->

Team Item Metal

Card de equipo a imagen completa (foto + scrim + nombre/rol + botón compartir). Al hover: el botón invierte de color y despliega en cascada un stack de redes sociales hacia arriba.

Default
Amit Patel Business Consultant
Hover
Amit Patel Business Consultant 
<div class="team-item-metal">
  <img class="team-item-metal__img" src="assets/img/team/amit-patel.jpg" alt="Amit Patel" loading="lazy">
  <span class="team-item-metal__scrim"></span>
  <div class="team-item-metal__info">
    <span class="team-item-metal__name">Amit Patel</span>
    <span class="team-item-metal__role">Business Consultant</span>
  </div>
  <div class="team-item-metal__social">
    <button type="button" class="team-item-metal__share" aria-label="Compartir perfil"><i data-lucide="share-2"></i></button>
    <a href="#" class="team-item-metal__social-link" aria-label="Instagram"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24">…</svg></a>
    <a href="#" class="team-item-metal__social-link" aria-label="X (Twitter)"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24">…</svg></a>
    <a href="#" class="team-item-metal__social-link" aria-label="Facebook"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24">…</svg></a>
    <a href="#" class="team-item-metal__social-link" aria-label="Pinterest"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24">…</svg></a>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Lucide no incluye logos de marca (instagram/x/facebook/pinterest);
     van como SVG inline propios, en el mismo estilo de línea que el resto.
     El botón "compartir" siempre visible; el stack de redes está oculto
     (opacity:0) hasta el :hover / :focus-within del card.
     .is-hover solo existe para documentarlo aquí de forma estática. -->

Progress Bar Metal

Label + porcentaje + barra de progreso. Variantes --light (fondo claro) y --dark (fondo oscuro). El ancho del fill se define inline y anima por transición si se actualiza dinámicamente (ej. al entrar en el viewport).

Light
Client Satisfaction Rate 98%
Dark
Client Satisfaction Rate 98% 
<div class="progress-bar-metal progress-bar-metal--light">
  <div class="progress-bar-metal__header">
    <span class="progress-bar-metal__label">Client Satisfaction Rate</span>
    <span class="progress-bar-metal__value">98%</span>
  </div>
  <div class="progress-bar-metal__track">
    <div class="progress-bar-metal__fill" style="width: 98%;"></div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Cambiar --light por --dark según el fondo. El % del label y el
     width inline del fill deben coincidir. -->

About Us Item Elite

Píldora ícono + label, para listas cortas de diferenciadores. Al hover, una cortina horizontal entra desde la izquierda e invierte ícono y texto a blanco.

Default
Trusted and reliable partner
Hover
Trusted and reliable partner 
<div class="about-us-item-elite">
  <span class="about-us-item-elite__icon"><i data-lucide="activity"></i></span>
  <span class="about-us-item-elite__label">Trusted and reliable partner</span>
</div>

<!-- El estado hover es automático (:hover / :focus-within).
     .is-hover solo existe para documentarlo aquí de forma estática. -->

Preview Video

Thumbnail con botón de play centrado. El anillo blanco pulsa hacia afuera en loop continuo (tipo sonar), independiente de hover. 

<a href="#" class="preview-video">
  <img class="preview-video__img" src="assets/img/portfolio/video-1.jpg" alt="…" loading="lazy">
  <span class="preview-video__play">
    <span class="preview-video__sonar"></span>
    <span class="preview-video__sonar preview-video__sonar--delay"></span>
    <i data-lucide="play" class="preview-video__icon"></i>
  </span>
</a>

<!-- Los dos .preview-video__sonar están desfasados 1000ms para que
     el pulso se vea continuo en vez de un solo anillo intermitente. -->

Expertise Item Elite

Anillo de progreso (SVG, stroke-dasharray/stroke-dashoffset) + título + descripción. Se agrupan en .expertise-item-list-elite, separados por un divisor (el último item no lleva borde inferior). Sin estados de interacción.

70%

Financial strategy

We design data-driven financial strategies that help performance, manage risks, & achieve long-term stability.

90%

Advisory services

We design data-driven financial strategies that help performance, manage risks, & achieve long-term stability.

80%

Business excellence

We design data-driven financial strategies that help performance, manage risks, & achieve long-term stability.

<div class="expertise-item-list-elite">
  <div class="expertise-item-elite">
    <div class="expertise-item-elite__ring">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" aria-hidden="true">
        <g class="expertise-item-elite__ring-rotate">
          <circle class="expertise-item-elite__ring-track" cx="50" cy="50" r="42"></circle>
          <circle class="expertise-item-elite__ring-progress" cx="50" cy="50" r="42"
                  style="stroke-dasharray: 263.9; stroke-dashoffset: 79.2;"></circle>
        </g>
        <circle class="expertise-item-elite__ring-dot" cx="50" cy="8" r="4"></circle>
      </svg>
      <span class="expertise-item-elite__percent">70%</span>
    </div>
    <div class="expertise-item-elite__content">
      <h3 class="expertise-item-elite__title">Financial strategy</h3>
      <p class="expertise-item-elite__desc">We design data-driven financial strategies…</p>
    </div>
  </div>
  <!-- … resto de items -->
</div>

<!-- dashoffset = circunferencia * (1 - porcentaje/100). Con r=42,
     circunferencia ≈ 263.9. El <g> rota -90° para que el arco
     empiece arriba (12 en punto); el punto (__ring-dot) va fuera
     de ese grupo para quedar fijo arriba sin rotar con el arco. -->

Hero Elite v1

Hero a imagen completa. Reutiliza badge--transparent y button-elite tal cual. Responsive por CSS (un solo markup, cambia aspect-ratio en mobile). El titular tiene una animación de entrada tipo cortina: cada línea la tapa una barra azul que se desliza para revelarla, en cascada.

Desktop / Mobile (responsive, redimensiona la ventana)
Finance & Consulting Experts

Driving growth through financial strategy

We help businesses and individuals navigate complex financial landscapes confidence through strategic planning.

Get Started
4.6
Our 100+ Happy Customers 
<section class="hero-elite-v1">
  <img class="hero-elite-v1__img" src="assets/img/hero-bg.jpg" alt="…" loading="eager">
  <span class="hero-elite-v1__scrim"></span>
  <div class="hero-elite-v1__content">
    <span class="badge badge--transparent">
      <i data-lucide="asterisk" class="badge__icon"></i>
      <span class="badge__label">Finance &amp; Consulting Experts</span>
    </span>
    <h1 class="hero-elite-v1__title">
      <span class="hero-elite-v1__title-mask"><span class="hero-elite-v1__title-line">Driving growth through</span></span>
      <span class="hero-elite-v1__title-mask"><span class="hero-elite-v1__title-line">financial strategy</span></span>
    </h1>
    <p class="hero-elite-v1__desc">We help businesses and individuals navigate complex financial landscapes confidence through strategic planning.</p>
    <hr class="hero-elite-v1__divider">
    <div class="hero-elite-v1__footer">
      <a href="#" class="button-elite">
        <span class="button-elite__label">Get Started</span>
        <span class="button-elite__icon"><i data-lucide="arrow-right"></i></span>
      </a>
      <div class="hero-elite-v1__social">
        <div class="hero-elite-v1__social-row">
          <div class="hero-elite-v1__avatars">
            <img class="hero-elite-v1__avatar" src="assets/img/avatars/1.jpg" alt="" loading="lazy">
            <!-- … 2 avatares más -->
          </div>
          <span class="hero-elite-v1__stars"><i data-lucide="star"></i><!-- x4 --></span>
          <span class="hero-elite-v1__rating-value">4.6</span>
        </div>
        <span class="hero-elite-v1__rating-caption">Our 100+ Happy Customers</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- La animación de las líneas del titular corre automáticamente al
     cargar la página (no depende de scroll ni de JS). -->

Hero Elite Slider

Variante de hero-elite-v1 con Swiper: 3 slides, cada una con su propia imagen y mensaje. El footer (divisor + CTA + social proof) es fijo, no cambia entre slides. La cortina del titular se re-dispara automáticamente en cada slide activo.

Finance & Consulting Experts

Driving growth through financial strategy

We help businesses and individuals navigate complex financial landscapes confidence through strategic planning.

Data-Driven Advisory

Strategic advisory for lasting success

Our experts craft tailored strategies that turn financial complexity into clear, confident decisions.

Trusted by Teams

Building wealth with proven expertise

From planning to execution, we help you grow, protect, and manage your financial future.

Get Started
4.6
Our 100+ Happy Customers 
<section class="hero-elite-slider">
  <div class="swiper hero-elite-slider__swiper">
    <div class="swiper-wrapper">
      <div class="swiper-slide hero-elite-slider__slide">
        <img class="hero-elite-slider__img" src="assets/img/lib/hero-bg-image-elite.jpg" alt="…" loading="eager">
        <span class="hero-elite-slider__scrim"></span>
        <div class="hero-elite-slider__slide-content">
          <span class="badge badge--transparent">…</span>
          <h1 class="hero-elite-slider__title">
            <span class="hero-elite-slider__title-mask"><span class="hero-elite-slider__title-line">Driving growth through</span></span>
            <span class="hero-elite-slider__title-mask"><span class="hero-elite-slider__title-line">financial strategy</span></span>
          </h1>
          <p class="hero-elite-slider__desc">…</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <!-- … 2 slides más -->
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Footer fijo: NO está dentro del swiper, no cambia entre slides -->
  <div class="hero-elite-slider__footer">
    <div class="hero-elite-slider__pagination swiper-pagination"></div>
    <hr class="hero-elite-slider__divider">
    <div class="hero-elite-slider__footer-row">
      <a href="#" class="button-elite">…</a>
      <div class="hero-elite-v1__social">…</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- initHeroSlider() en main.js instancia el Swiper con effect:'fade',
     autoplay y la paginación apuntando a .hero-elite-slider__pagination
     (que vive fuera del swiper, en el footer fijo). La cortina del
     titular se re-dispara sola vía el selector .swiper-slide-active,
     sin necesidad de reiniciarla desde JS. -->

Marquee

Cinta de texto en scroll infinito, separada por ícono. Variantes --light y --dark, ambas con vidrio esmerilado real (backdrop-filter: blur(30px)). Responsive: tipografía y padding se reducen en mobile.

Dark (backdrop-filter)
Investment Advisory Financial Reporting and Analysis Regulatory Compliance Support
Investment Advisory Financial Reporting and Analysis Regulatory Compliance Support
Light (backdrop-filter)
Investment Advisory Financial Reporting and Analysis Regulatory Compliance Support
Investment Advisory Financial Reporting and Analysis Regulatory Compliance Support 
<div class="marquee marquee--dark">
  <div class="marquee__track">
    <div class="marquee__group">
      <span class="marquee__item"><i data-lucide="asterisk" class="marquee__icon"></i>Investment Advisory</span>
      <!-- … resto de items -->
    </div>
    <div class="marquee__group" aria-hidden="true">
      <!-- copia idéntica del grupo anterior, oculta a lectores de pantalla -->
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- El track anima translateX(0 → -50%): como hay 2 grupos idénticos,
     -50% equivale exactamente al ancho de un grupo → loop perfecto,
     sin salto visible. Cambiar --dark por --light según el fondo. -->

Navbar Elite

Navegación principal con fondo transparente, pensada para ir sobre un hero oscuro. Dropdowns de escritorio por click; en mobile, menú off-canvas con submenús tipo acordeón (redimensiona la ventana para ver el toggle mobile por debajo de 992px).

    • Home – Version 1
    • Home – Version 2
    • Home – Version 3
  • About Us
  • Services
  • Blog
    • Team
    • Pricing
    • FAQ
    • 404 Page
  • Contact Us
Contact Us
    • Home – Version 1
    • Home – Version 2
    • Home – Version 3
  • About Us
  • Services
  • Blog
    • Team
    • Pricing
    • FAQ
    • 404 Page
  • Contact Us
<header class="navbar-elite">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="navbar-elite__row">
      <a href="index.html" class="navbar-elite__brand">
        <img class="navbar-elite__logo-img" src="assets/img/logos/logo.svg" alt="Finanze">
      </a>

      <nav class="navbar-elite__nav">
        <ul class="navbar-elite__menu">
          <li class="navbar-elite__item navbar-elite__item--dropdown">
            <button class="navbar-elite__link" type="button" aria-expanded="false">
              Home <i data-lucide="chevron-down" class="navbar-elite__chevron"></i>
            </button>
            <ul class="navbar-elite__dropdown">
              <li><a href="#" class="navbar-elite__dropdown-link">Home – Version 1</a></li>
              <!-- … -->
            </ul>
          </li>
          <li class="navbar-elite__item"><a href="#" class="navbar-elite__link">About Us</a></li>
          <!-- … resto de items -->
        </ul>
      </nav>

      <a href="#" class="button-elite navbar-elite__cta">
        <span class="button-elite__label">Contact Us</span>
        <span class="button-elite__icon"><i data-lucide="arrow-right"></i></span>
      </a>

      <button class="navbar-elite__toggle" type="button" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Abrir menú">
        <span class="navbar-elite__toggle-icon navbar-elite__toggle-icon--open"><i data-lucide="menu"></i></span>
        <span class="navbar-elite__toggle-icon navbar-elite__toggle-icon--close"><i data-lucide="x"></i></span>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="navbar-elite__mobile">
    <ul class="navbar-elite__mobile-menu">
      <li class="navbar-elite__mobile-item">
        <button class="navbar-elite__mobile-link" type="button">Home <i data-lucide="chevron-down" class="navbar-elite__mobile-chevron"></i></button>
        <div class="navbar-elite__mobile-submenu">
          <ul class="navbar-elite__mobile-submenu-inner">
            <li><a href="#" class="navbar-elite__mobile-sublink">Home – Version 1</a></li>
            <!-- … -->
          </ul>
        </div>
      </li>
      <!-- … resto de items -->
    </ul>
  </div>
</header>

<!-- initNavbarElite() en main.js maneja: dropdowns de escritorio (click,
     cierra al hacer click afuera), el toggle mobile (hamburguesa ↔ X)
     y los submenús tipo acordeón dentro del panel off-canvas. -->

Footer Elite

Pie de página: 4 columnas + barra inferior de copyright/legal. Responsive con el grid de Bootstrap (1 columna en mobile, 2 en tablet, 4 en desktop); la barra inferior pasa de fila a columna y reordena legal/copyright en mobile.

About Company

We are a trusted finance and consulting firm dedicated to helping businesses & individuals make smarter financial decisions.

Quick Links

  • Home
  • About Us
  • Our Services
  • Projects
  • Contact Us

Our Services

  • Financial Planning
  • Business Consulting
  • Investment Advisory
  • Risk Management
  • Corporate Strategy

Working Hours

Monday – Friday: 09:00 AM – 05:00 PM
Saturday: 09:00 AM – 05:00 PM
Sunday: Closed
Copyright © 2026 All Rights Reserved.
Help Privacy Policy Terms & Conditions 
<footer class="footer-elite">
  <div class="container-fluid">
    <div class="row g-4 footer-elite__columns">
      <div class="col-12 col-md-6 col-lg-3">
        <h3 class="footer-elite__heading">About Company</h3>
        <p class="footer-elite__about-desc">…</p>
        <div class="footer-elite__social">
          <a href="#" class="footer-elite__social-link" aria-label="Pinterest"><svg …></svg></a>
          <!-- … X, Facebook, Instagram -->
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-12 col-md-6 col-lg-3">
        <h3 class="footer-elite__heading">Quick Links</h3>
        <ul class="footer-elite__list">
          <li><a href="#" class="footer-elite__link">Home</a></li>
          <!-- … -->
        </ul>
      </div>
      <!-- … Our Services, Working Hours -->
    </div>

    <div class="footer-elite__bottom">
      <span class="footer-elite__copyright">Copyright © 2026 All Rights Reserved.</span>
      <div class="footer-elite__legal">
        <a href="#" class="footer-elite__legal-link">Help</a>
        <a href="#" class="footer-elite__legal-link">Privacy Policy</a>
        <a href="#" class="footer-elite__legal-link">Terms &amp; Conditions</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</footer>

<!-- Los íconos de redes sociales son los mismos SVG inline que
     team-item-metal (Lucide no incluye logos de marca). -->
